name: InstructPix2Pix Edit
description: Instruction-based image editing with CLIPSeg auto-masking. Upload an image and describe what to change (e.g. 'make the pants green'). CLIPSeg generates a mask from your text, then only that region is edited — everything else stays pixel-identical.
author: iammojogo

params_schema.label: Edit Instruction
params_schema.tooltip: Describe the edit (e.g. 'make the pants green', 'turn the shirt into blue')

params_schema.label: Auto-Mask Region
params_schema.tooltip: ONLY edit the detected object (OFF = full image, old behavior)

params_schema.label: Mask Target (optional)
params_schema.tooltip: Override: type the object name directly (e.g. 'skin', 'shirt'). Leave empty to auto-extract from instruction.

params_schema.label: Mask Sensitivity
params_schema.tooltip: Lower = more sensitive mask (catches faint regions). 0.3 default, 0.05 for blocky/stylized characters.

params_schema.label: Color Snap (0=off)
params_schema.tooltip: Snap mask to matching pixels. 0=disabled, 20-40 for flat-color characters (Roblox).

params_schema.label: Exclude (optional)
params_schema.tooltip: Exclude this concept (e.g. 'arms' to isolate hands from arms, 'background' to cut out subject)

params_schema.label: Guidance Scale
params_schema.tooltip: How strongly to follow the instruction

params_schema.label: Image Guidance
params_schema.tooltip: Lower = more creative edits (auto-mask hides global tint)
